attributes.action: Free sanitary products for women and girls
attributes.additional_details: Many women struggle to purchase products
attributes.background: People can to a pharmacy and get free access to contraceptives I.e condoms but women have to pay for menstrual products. Intercourse is a choice the menstrual cycle is not

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958
